# Ukrainian Proverbs Corpus (Українські прислів'я та приказки)

> An open, deduplicated, source-attributed corpus of 48,787 Ukrainian proverbs and adages
> (прислів'я та приказки), unified from five digitized collections spanning 1841 to the present.
> Each entry carries a modern-spelling rendering and 1–3 thematic categories; ~30,500 include scholarly
> explanations. Free and public, with a searchable web app and a multi-format REST API.

Base URL: https://verbacorpus.org

## What it is

- 48,787 proverbs; 27 fixed thematic categories; soft-deduplicated, with cross-source variant links (never destructively merged).
- Per-proverb fields: `id`, `text` (original orthography), `modern_text` (modern spelling), `category[]`, `sources[]`, `variant_group`, `explanation`.
- Sources: Франко 1901 (30,906) · Номис 1864 (9,785) · Бобкова (5,613) · Ількевич 1841 (2,702) · Млодзинський 2009 (2,261).
- Quality: 19th-century sources are public domain; the Номис 1864 entries are best-effort OCR + LLM extraction (~75–80%, flagged via the `Nomis1864` source and documented). `modern_text` and `category` are LLM-generated.

## REST API

Every data endpoint supports `?format=json|jsonl|xml|csv|tsv` (default `json`) or the `Accept` header.

- `GET /api/v1/search?q=&category=&source=&limit=&offset=` — lexical (substring) search
- `GET /api/v1/semantic?q=&category=&source=&minScore=&limit=` — meaning-based search (embeddings)
- `GET /api/v1/random?n=&category=&source=` — N random proverbs
- `GET /api/v1/query?category=&source=&variant_group=&has_explanation=&limit=&offset=` — flexible filter
- `GET /api/v1/proverb/{id}` — a single proverb, including its explanation
- `GET /api/v1/export?category=&source=` — the whole corpus (or filtered), including explanations
- `GET /api/v1/categories` — the 27 themes with counts
- `GET /api/v1/meta` — corpus metadata

Collections return `{total, limit, offset, results}`; CORS is open (`Access-Control-Allow-Origin: *`).

## Docs

- OpenAPI 3 spec: https://verbacorpus.org/api/v1/openapi.json
- Human docs + curl examples: https://verbacorpus.org/api.html
- Source code & data: https://github.com/dmytro-yemelianov/verbacorpus

## Examples

- `curl 'https://verbacorpus.org/api/v1/search?q=гроші&format=json'`
- `curl 'https://verbacorpus.org/api/v1/random?n=1'`
- `curl 'https://verbacorpus.org/api/v1/export?format=jsonl'`

## Notes

- Proverbs are in Ukrainian; field names and this file are in English.
- Licensing: historical sources (1841–1909) are public domain; modern collections (Млодзинський 2009, Бобкова) may carry rights — attribute per each entry's `sources`.
